info.title: apollokit Admin API
info.description:
apollokit is a multi-tenant game-SaaS backend. Routes are split into

- **Admin** (`/api/<module>/...`): server-to-server calls (operations dashboards, cron, data pipelines). Authenticate with an admin API key (`x-api-key: ak_…`).
- **Client** (`/api/client/<module>/...`): consumed by tenant frontends on behalf of end users. Authenticate with a client publishable key (`x-api-key: cpk_…`). End-user-scoped routes additionally require `x-end-user-id` and `x-user-hash` headers — `x-user-hash` is HMAC-SHA256(endUserId, decrypted csk_) hex, computed by the client SDK at runtime.

Every business endpoint returns the standard envelope `{ code, data, message, requestId }`. Success uses `code: "ok"` and the payload in `data`. Validation errors use HTTP 400 and `code: "validation_error"`. Domain errors use the module-specific `code` (e.g. `check_in.config_not_found`) at their declared HTTP status. Better Auth routes (`/api/auth/*`, `/api/client/auth/*`) keep the third-party library's native format.

get.summary: Health check

post.summary: Issue a short-lived Tinybird JWT scoped to this tenant
post.description: Returns a JWT the admin UI can hand directly to Tinybird. The `org_id` query parameter on each pipe is pinned in the token and cannot be overridden by the client.

amount.description: Demand only — partial withdraw amount. Omit to withdraw everything (principal + interest).

metadata.description: Arbitrary JSON blob for tenant-specific extensions.

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page, or null if no more rows.

alias.description: Optional human-readable key, unique within the org.

metadata.description: Arbitrary JSON blob for tenant-specific extensions.

alias.description: Optional human-readable key, unique within the org.

period.description: Reset cycle: daily, weekly, monthly, or none (permanent).

countingMethod.description: How progress increments: event_count (+1), event_value (+data field), child_completion (SUM of children).

eventName.description: Event name to listen for. Required for event_count/event_value.

eventValueField.description: Dot-path into eventData for event_value counting. e.g. 'amount'.

filter.description: Optional filtrex expression evaluated against eventData. The event only advances progress if it returns truthy. Nested fields use dot notation, e.g. `monsterId == "dragon" and stats.level >= 10`.

targetValue.description: Goal value to complete the task.

parentProgressValue.description: Progress contributed to parent task on completion. Default 1.

prerequisiteTaskIds.description: Task definition IDs that must be completed first.

rewardTiers.description: Staged (阶段性) rewards claimable at intermediate progress thresholds. Empty array keeps the legacy single-reward behavior. Aliases must be unique and thresholds strictly increasing and <= targetValue.

navigation.description: Client-side navigation config. Server stores it opaquely.

activityId.description: Soft link to an activity. Null means this is a permanent task.

visibility.description: 'broadcast' (default) → visible to all end users. 'assigned' → only visible to users with an active task_user_assignments row.

defaultAssignmentTtlSeconds.description: Default TTL applied to assignments that don't specify their own expiry. Null = no default expiry.

metadata.description: Arbitrary JSON blob for tenant-specific extensions.

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page, or null if no more rows.

alias.description: Optional human-readable key, unique within the org.

navigation.description: Client-side navigation config. Server stores it opaquely.

metadata.description: Arbitrary JSON blob for tenant-specific extensions.

endUserIds.description: Target end-user ids. 1..1000 per call — chunk larger cohorts.

source.description: Who/what is performing the assignment. Defaults to 'manual' when omitted.

sourceRef.description: Free-form caller-defined pointer. e.g. a CRM request id, rule alias, admin user id.

expiresAt.description: Absolute ISO 8601 expiry. Mutually exclusive with ttlSeconds. Null keeps the assignment indefinite.

ttlSeconds.description: Relative TTL in seconds. Mutually exclusive with expiresAt. Falls back to the definition's defaultAssignmentTtlSeconds when omitted.

allowReassign.description: If true, refresh assignedAt/expiresAt/source on already-assigned rows. Default false (no-op on existing active rows; revive revoked rows).

alias.description: Optional human-readable key, unique within the project.

maxMembers.description: Maximum number of members in a team.

autoDissolveOnLeaderLeave.description: Dissolve team when leader leaves instead of transferring leadership.

allowQuickMatch.description: Allow quick match to auto-join open teams.

alias.description: Optional human-readable key, unique within the project.

targetAmount.description: Total work to complete the pool. For mode='decrement' the instance starts here and counts down to 0. For mode='accumulate' it starts at 0 and grows here.

fields.description: Full replacement of the field list. Sets status='canonical' — fields will no longer be merged from future payloads.

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page, or null if no more rows.
Opaque cursor for the next page, or null if no more rows.

eventTypes.description: List of subscribed event types. Empty / omitted = subscribe to all events. Wildcard `name.*` matches any event whose type starts with `name.`.

secret.description: Plaintext signing secret — shown only once. Store securely.

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page, or null if no more rows.

status.description: Admin can flip between `active` and `disabled`. `paused_failing` is auto-set by the delivery loop and cleared by transitioning back to `active`.

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page, or null if no more rows.

alias.description: Stable identifier for this tier, unique within the task. Used as the idempotency key on the claim ledger — keeping it stable lets admins add/remove/reorder tiers without invalidating prior claims.

threshold.description: currentValue >= threshold makes this tier claimable. Must be <= targetValue.

rewards.description: Rewards granted when this tier is claimed.

route.description: One of the registered internal routes. See LINK_ROUTE_REGISTRY.

oneOf.description: Navigate to a registered in-app route. Params are validated per-route against the schema declared in LINK_ROUTE_REGISTRY.

code.description: 档位 code。[a-z0-9-_] 开头 [a-z0-9-_]。约定 'free' 为免费档。

requiresTier.description: 档位 code。[a-z0-9-_] 开头 [a-z0-9-_]。约定 'free' 为免费档。

AdminApiKey.name: x-api-key
AdminApiKey.description: Admin API key (`ak_…` prefix). Send in the `x-api-key` request header. Issued via Better Auth `/api/auth/api-key` (configId=`admin`).
